name: Apple Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 red delicious apple (it can be overripe)
2 1/4 cup vanilla lite rice milk, or low-fat soymilk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 400 degrees.
2. If using a 10-inch iron skillet, rub some oil on the cooking surface and let it heat in the oven.
3. Peel the apple and cut into very thin pieces of any size.
4. In a large bowl, combine all other ingredients except the apple.
5. Add the apple to the mixture and do not overmix.
6. Pour the batter into the heated iron skillet or an oiled casserole pan.
7. Bake for 35 minutes on the top shelf.
8. Check if done by inserting a knife; it should come out clean.
9. Let rest for 10-20 minutes to settle and firm up, if desired.
Note: Using two apples may enhance the flavor. Additional sweetener like maple syrup can be added if needed.
